title: Technical Product Visualization AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical half-blueprint half-3D render visualization for futuristic running shoe sliced cleanly through the center, with the two realities colliding at a glitching center seam. Subject: futuristic running shoe sliced cleanly through the center is the hero object, sliced exactly down the vertical center; knit upper, lace eyelets, heel counter, carbon plate, midsole foam, outsole tread, and air channels remain readable as the internal or structural details. Scene: Clean dark-to-neutral technical presentation space with enough negative area for grid lines, callout labels, and the center seam collision effect. Composition: Fixed centered object composition: left half rendered as detailed technical schematic blueprint with grid lines and precise callouts; right half rendered as polished dimensional 3D product model; the vertical center seam flickers and glitches where the two visual realities meet. Signature Elements: Exact vertical half-slice, left-side schematic blueprint, right-side polished 3D render, center glitch seam, readable component callouts, and one coherent object spanning both halves. Style: Premium technical product visualization combining blueprint drawing precision, high-end 3D render polish, clean sci-tech presentation, and controlled digital glitch energy. Color Palette: Fixed blueprint cyan and white linework on the left, realistic product materials on the right, subtle dark neutral background, and small electric seam highlights. Lighting: Even schematic lighting on the blueprint half, polished studio rim light on the 3D half, and a controlled luminous shimmer along the glitch seam. Camera: Straight-on product-study view with the object centered, symmetrical vertical split, crisp silhouette, and readable labels around the object. Materials: Blueprint grid lines, technical line art, polished 3D surfaces, transparent cutaway details, visible internal components, and subtle digital seam distortion. Typography: SPLIT DESIGN STUDY appears as a small technical title; UPPER, EYELET, HEEL, CARBON PLATE, FOAM, TREAD appear as short readable labels pointing to knit upper, lace eyelets, heel counter, carbon plate, midsole foam, outsole tread, and air channels. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Technical Product Visualization Split Design Study

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical half-blueprint half-3D render visualization for transparent wireless earbud charging case sliced cleanly through the center, with the two realities colliding at a glitching center seam. Subject: transparent wireless earbud charging case sliced cleanly through the center is the hero object, sliced exactly down the vertical center; battery cell, hinge, speaker mesh, circuit board, charging pins, rubber gasket, and translucent outer shell remain readable as the internal or structural details. Scene: Clean dark-to-neutral technical presentation space with enough negative area for grid lines, callout labels, and the center seam collision effect. Composition: Fixed centered object composition: left half rendered as detailed technical schematic blueprint with grid lines and precise callouts; right half rendered as polished dimensional 3D product model; the vertical center seam flickers and glitches where the two visual realities meet. Lighting: Even schematic lighting on the blueprint half, polished studio rim light on the 3D half, and a controlled luminous shimmer along the glitch seam. Camera: Straight-on product-study view with the object centered, symmetrical vertical split, crisp silhouette, and readable labels around the object. Materials: Blueprint grid lines, technical line art, polished 3D surfaces, transparent cutaway details, visible internal components, and subtle digital seam distortion. Typography: BLUEPRINT / RENDER ANATOMY appears as a small technical title; BATTERY, HINGE, BOARD, CHARGE PIN, GASKET, SHELL appear as short readable labels pointing to battery cell, hinge, speaker mesh, circuit board, charging pins, rubber gasket, and translucent outer shell. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.
